problem: What catalyst efficiently converts atmospheric CO2 to useful compounds at ambient conditions?
hypothesis: If Bioelectrochemical system for pollutant conversion is applied to at, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Sensor network monitoring with 4 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
